message:
fix(storage): eliminate unreachable!() at sqlite.rs:842 with explicit error handling (beads_rust-ivw1)

Replace unreachable!("Retry loop exited without returning") with
structured error propagation: track last transient error across retry
iterations and return it if the loop exhausts. Add tests for
jittered_backoff behavior and write_transaction error propagation.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
